payload.summary: ILWU Local 13 work slowdown at LA/Long Beach has created an anchorage queue of 89 vessels — 2.1x the UNCTAD 30-day baseline. Drayage operations severely impacted.
payload.headline: LA/Long Beach dockworkers slowdown creates 89-vessel anchorage backup
payload.ilwu_statement: ILWU Local 13 announced a work-to-rule action effective immediately at Ports of Los Angeles and Long Beach, citing unresolved contract negotiations.

citations.title: Port of Los Angeles operational advisory — labor action
